MISSING_DUE_DATE.description: Set due date equal to the bill date.

MISSING_DESCRIPTION.description: Try attachment vision first, fall back to AI inference from context.

MISSING_TAX_RATE.description: Infer tax type from account code via account_tax_defaults config mapping.

ZERO_AMOUNT.description: Bill total is zero — try to extract correct amount from attachment.

FOREIGN_CURRENCY_AMOUNT.description: Detect foreign currency in attachment, convert amounts using live FX rate.

MISSING_SUPPLIER.description: Extract merchant name from receipt, match against existing contacts.

account_tax_defaults._comment: Maps account code → Xero TaxType. INPUT2 = 20% VAT. NONE = no VAT. Customise to your Chart of Accounts.
